# Keep website visitors coming back with this FREE tool

## Metadata
- **From:** "Jolissa @ MonsterInsights" <support@monsterinsights.com>
- **Date:** 2024-09-30 06:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 156

## Body
Hi Muhammad!

I've got a trivia question for you.

What percent of people who visit your website will never return?

The answer: over 70% 😲

Luckily, there are a few proven ways you can get visitors coming
back to your site so that you can make more money from an already
engaged audience.

The best and easiest way? Email marketing.

Think about it: When you sign up for anything on the web like a
social media account, a free membership, or even when making a
donation, what’s the first thing you’re asked to provide?

Your email address, of course!

Companies everywhere know that email is the number one best way
to connect with customers and grow their business.

Now, it's your turn. I have a simple and free way to get started
😀

We've partnered with Constant Contact 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3jsglwLCWohhceOEAGSR38XkhXv6zD_H8QPO7f2cJBc )
to give you an amazing deal.

With our special link, you can sign up for free, with no credit
card needed, so that you can kick the tires and see how simple
and powerful email marketing can be for your business.

Better yet, only after you see success and determine it's a
perfect fit for your business, you'll get an exclusive 20% off
your subscription for 3 months.

Cool, right?

👉 Sign up free now 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3jsglwLCWohhceOEAGSR38XkhXv6zD_H8QPO7f2cJBc ) 👈

Never heard of Constant Contact?

Constant Contact is one of the easiest to use email marketing
platforms, designed for small businesses. Beyond creating awesome
emails, you can easily set up automation tools, connect with
WordPress, create social media ads, and more.

If you have any questions, simply reply to this email and let me
know.

Until next time,

Jolissa Skow
MonsterInsights Product Educator
